summary: Added _delivery_order: list[int] field to MessageHandler. _assign_image_index now appends each assigned index to _delivery_order under the state lock. handle_accept uses _delivery_order for iteration instead of sorted(image_index_map.keys()). _delivery_order is cleared alongside _image_index_map and _deleted_indices after accept. Updated existing tests to set _delivery_order alongside _image_index_map, and added 2 new tests covering the ordering contract and clear-on-accept.
